1.premise: Immigration policy could be designed as a personal sexual preference system.
A border wall could include an exception for attractive immigrants.

2.premise: Importing attractive immigrants could be offset by deporting unattractive ones at a set exchange rate.
A fentanyl overdose is framed first as a success, then as a crime.

1.premise: "Chill" can mean emotionally relaxed or literally cold and dead.

2.premise: "Imagine how I feel" implies survivor's guilt, but reveals culpability as the drug dealer.

lines.text: Great to be here. What's up, folks?
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: I don't know how y'all feel about immigration, but I feel like all things, we need some balance.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Like, I think we should build a wall.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: We should also install a doggy door for hot Latinas.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: We need them desperately.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: I think we should import millions of gorgeous Latinas.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: And for every Latina we import, we can deport one obese white chick.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: Maybe two to one or three to one.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: I don't know what the exchange rate is.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: And a big white gal.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: It's been a tough year.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: My best friend died from a fake Xanax that had fentanyl in it.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Yeah, he would take Xanax to help him chill out.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Now he's about as chill as you can possibly get.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: Eternally chill.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: Yeah.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: And my other friend FaceTimed him the night he died.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: He still feels horrible.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: [squeak]
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: Feels like he could have saved him somehow.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Imagine how I feel.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I sold him that Xanax.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: Thank you, folks.
lines.label: fluff
